en_title: Xbox Game Studios Boss Departs Amid Growing Concern Over Layoffs and Possible Studio Shutdowns
cn_title: Xbox游戏工作室负责人离职，裁撤阴影笼罩
subtitle: 山雨欲来
opus_summary: 微软XGS负责人Craig Duncan与幕僚长Louise O'Connor离职。此前部门因利润微薄被警告，下月或裁员。多个多年无爆款的小工作室前景堪忧。

paragraphs.en: Two of Microsoft's most senior managers overseeing Xbox Game Studios are departing the business, it's been reported.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，微软负责Xbox Game Studios的两位最高级管理人员即将离职。

paragraphs.en: Head of Xbox Game Studios Craig Duncan and chief of staff Louise O'Connor are leaving Xbox after decades at the firm. Both previously served long tenures at celebrated British studio Rare, which Duncan headed up for more than 10 years.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox Game Studios负责人Craig Duncan和幕僚长Louise O'Connor在微软供职数十年后即将离开Xbox。两人此前都曾在知名英国工作室Rare长期任职，Duncan领导该工作室超过10年。

paragraphs.en: The departures were first reported today by The Game Business . No reason was given for their joint exit, though it comes at a time of intense concern for the future of Xbox Game Studios and its many staff members — after a dire warning from new Xbox boss Asha Sharma over the division's slim profit margin.
paragraphs.cn: The Game Business今天率先报道了离职消息。两人共同离职的原因并未给出，不过这一事件发生之际，正值外界对Xbox Game Studios及其众多员工未来深感担忧——此前新上任的Xbox负责人Asha Sharma对该部门微薄的利润率发出了严厉警告。

paragraphs.en: Sharma's comments have been taken by many as a public warning that job losses are imminent, and indeed, a Bloomberg report signalled that layoffs would happen as soon as next month .
paragraphs.cn: 许多人将Sharma的言论视为裁员迫在眉睫的公开警告，而彭博社的报道确实暗示，裁员最早可能在下月进行。

paragraphs.en: Fans are particularly concerned over the fate of several smaller teams that have not shipped a hit game in years, such as South of Midnight developer Compulsion Games, Kiln and Keeper maker Double Fine, and the already-downsized Turn 10 Studios.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝尤其担忧几个多年未能推出热门游戏的小团队命运，比如《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion Games、《Kiln》和《Keeper》的开发商Double Fine，以及已经缩编的Turn 10 Studios。

paragraphs.en: Duncan joined Rare in 2011, and led the company through its period where it was best known for Kinect Sports, to launch the hugely-successful Sea of Thieves.
paragraphs.cn: Duncan于2011年加入Rare，带领公司度过了以《Kinect Sports》最为人熟知的阶段，随后推出了大获成功的《盗贼之海》。

paragraphs.en: O'Connor, meanwhile, previously headed up the now-cancelled fantasy RPG project Everwild at Rare, following decades of service that began back in 1999 as an animator on potty-mouthed N64 adventure Conker's Bad Fur Day.
paragraphs.cn: O'Connor曾在Rare负责现已取消的奇幻RPG项目《Everwild》。在此之前，她已在Rare效力数十年，最早可追溯到1999年，当时她担任N64平台满嘴脏话的冒险游戏《Conker's Bad Fur Day》的动画师。

paragraphs.en: "When I stepped into the role of leading XGS 20 months ago, my purpose was to serve our studios, our teams, and the people making our games," Duncan wrote in an email announcing his departure, published by The Game Business. "Together, we set out to deliver high-quality games, strengthen the cultural fabric across our studios, and help shape the future of the business. I’m proud to say we delivered many flawless launches that drove business success for the company.
paragraphs.cn: Duncan在宣布离职的邮件中写道：「20个月前我接任XGS负责人一职时，我的目标就是服务好我们的工作室、我们的团队，以及制作游戏的那些人。」这封邮件由《The Game Business》发布。他还写道：「我们齐心协力，致力于推出高质量的游戏，增强各工作室之间的文化纽带，并帮助塑造业务的未来。我自豪地说，我们实现了多次完美发布，推动了公司的商业成功。」

paragraphs.en: "Louise has been a thoughtful, creative, and trusted partner who has consistently championed the craft and supported our studios with clarity and care. I'm grateful for everything she's brought to XGS, and I'm sure she'll be successful in whatever comes next for her."
paragraphs.cn: 他还写道：「Louise是一位深思熟虑、富有创意且值得信赖的伙伴，她始终支持创作，并以清晰的思路和关怀支持着我们的工作室。我很感激她为XGS带来的一切，我也相信她无论未来做什么都会取得成功。」

paragraphs.en: Without Duncan and O'Connor, Xbox Game Studios leaders will now report directly into Xbox chief content officer Matt Booty for the time being.
paragraphs.cn: 在Duncan和O'Connor离职后，Xbox Game Studios的各负责人目前将直接向Xbox首席内容官Matt Booty汇报工作。

paragraphs.en: Last week, as Sharma now attempts to improve the Xbox division's balance sheet. "The studios most exposed are brilliant for prestige and rotten for the spreadsheet," one analyst said.
paragraphs.cn: 上周，随着Sharma如今试图改善Xbox部门的资产负债表，一位分析师表示：「那些风险最大的工作室，在声誉上表现出色，但在财务报表上则是灾难。」

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。您可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
